Welcome

Your Gateway to Startup Growth and Funding

Investment Brokers, a leading online incubator/accelerator, empowers startups globally with millions raised for ventures. We specialize in connecting startups with our extensive network of angel investors and venture capitalists, boasting an extremely high success rate.

Apply Now

We're ready to invest in startups that:

Looking to validate their idea

We assist by validating ideas, valuing them, constructing proof of concept, estimating MVP costs, conducting business feasibility studies, competitive analysis, SWOT analysis, and market research

Building Their MVP

We provide the full technical team capable of doing software development, Android app development and iOS app development and app design

Ready To grow

Our offerings include Sales as a Service, Business Marketing Strategy, SEO Services, Business Development, and Business Growth strategies

We Solve your startups challenges

Startup Funding

You’ll get an extensive network of investors, a precise matching system tailored to investor interests, a dedicated team for engaging with investors and venture capitalists, comprehensive feedback, assistance in negotiations with angel investors, and access to financial consultants and advisors.

Building Tech Products And MVPs

We step in as your technical co-founder, offering services and investment in exchange for sweat equity, and construct the entire technical product from start to finish

Scaling Existing Business And Exploring New Markets

You’ll get access to a comprehensive partner equipped to supply resources and networking, enhance marketing and sales efforts, and bring innovative solutions to your sales and marketing strategies.

Our Services

Startup Growth

Technical Development
